case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. SHANIMA DEMARTRA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $3.43 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEMARTRA, SHANIMA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 80 BLYTHDALE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO CA 94134, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT DEMARTRA, SHANIMA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
